message:
fix: address Copilot review feedback from PRs #4105, #4106, #4107 (#4109)

- Replace hardcoded English aria-labels with i18n t() calls across
  OvnStatus, KubevirtStatus, K3sStatus, ComplianceDrift components
- Use aria-labelledby for MultiTenancyOverview isolation score header
- Stabilize CopyCmd aria-label to avoid volatile accessible names and
  add aria-live region for copy feedback
- Add enableBackspace prop to BaseModal so form modals like
  CardConfigModal can disable Space/Backspace-to-close behavior
- Add new i18n keys for all localized aria-labels in en/cards.json

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
